message:
feat(ffs-core): device-based extent mapping for regular files (bd-ye4)

Add extent tree traversal via ByteDevice to OpenFs, enabling file reads
without loading the entire image into memory. Three public methods:
- resolve_extent: logical→physical block mapping (depth>0 supported)
- collect_extents: flatten multi-level extent trees into Vec<Ext4Extent>
- read_file_data: read file bytes using extent mapping + device I/O

9 new tests covering leaf-only extents, index+leaf extents, holes,
partial reads, and past-EOF reads using synthetic ext4 images.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
